long_description:
[RNOS]-RNOS PublicIPAvailablePercent is at or below 10% [DAL] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/public_ips_alert.html
TIP Situation:                      Observed Low Public IP available in Address Registry issue in is-rnos-public-ips
TIP Short Description:              RNOS PublicIPAvailablePercent is at or below 10% rias-ng-us-south-dal13-prod
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:is-network-ips:us-south::rias-ng-us-south-dal13-prod:microservice:

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    sum by (kube_cluster_name, zone)((avg_over_time(rias_rnos_public_ip_available{}[10m])/(avg_over_time(rias_rnos_public_ip_available{}[10m]) + avg_over_time(rias_rnos_public_ip_used{}[10m]))*100) / 3) <= 10 = 9.49
Segment:
    zone = 'us-south-1' and kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-us-south-dal13-prod'

Time:                12/08/2025 01:38 AM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [RNOS]-RNOS PublicIPAvailablePercent is at or below 10% [DAL]
Description:    RNOS PublicIPAvailablePercent is at or below 10% rias-ng-us-south-dal13-prod

Scope:          
Alert When:     sum by (kube_cluster_name, zone)((avg_over_time(rias_rnos_public_ip_available{}[10m])/(avg_over_time(rias_rnos_public_ip_available{}[10m]) + avg_over_time(rias_rnos_public_ip_used{}[10m]))*100) / 3) <= 10
